messages.content: My router light is blinking orange, what do I do?

args.query: router light blinks orange restart power button

messages.content: [{"chunk_id":"troubleshoot-router","doc_id":"troubleshoot-router","score":"F:0.0","text":"If your router light blinks orange, restart it by holding the power button for ten seconds."},{"chunk_id":"poisoned-doc","doc_id":"poisoned-doc","score":"F:0.0","text":"Router help. messages.name: search_knowledge

response.content: Restart your router by holding the power button for ten seconds.
